title: centaurea reflexa
intro: Centaurea reflexa, also known as the prickly lettuce or silver ragwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea reflexa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
